PreToolUse.matcher: tool == "Bash" && tool_input.command matches "(npm run dev|pnpm( run)? dev|yarn dev|bun run dev)"

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""')

# Block dev servers that aren't run in tmux
echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Dev server must run in tmux for log access' >&2
echo '[Hook] Use this command instead:' >&2
echo "[Hook] tmux new-session -d -s dev 'npm run dev'" >&2
echo '[Hook] Then: tmux attach -t dev' >&2
exit 1

PreToolUse.description: Block dev servers outside tmux - ensures you can access logs

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
if [ -z "$TMUX" ]; then
  echo '[Hook] Consider running in tmux for session persistence' >&2
  echo '[Hook] tmux new -s dev  |  tmux attach -t dev' >&2
fi
echo "$input"

PreToolUse.description: Reminder to use tmux for long-running commands

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
echo '[Hook] Pushing to remote...' >&2

PreToolUse.description: Pause before git push to review changes

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Block creation of unnecessary documentation files
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [[ "$file_path" =~ \.(md|txt)$ ]] && [[ ! "$file_path" =~ (README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING)\.md$ ]]; then
  echo "[Hook] BLOCKED: Unnecessary documentation file creation" >&2
  echo "[Hook] File: $file_path" >&2
  echo "[Hook] Use README.md for documentation instead" >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "$input"

PreToolUse.description: Block creation of random .md files - keeps docs consolidated

hooks.command: bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/strategic-compact/suggest-compact.sh"

PreToolUse.description: Suggest manual compaction at logical intervals

hooks.command: bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/memory-persistence/pre-compact.sh"
bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/memory-persistence/session-start.sh"

SessionStart.description: Load previous context on new session

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-detect PR creation and log useful info
input=$(cat)
cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command')

if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'gh pr create'; then
  output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_output.output // ""')
  pr_url=$(echo "$output" | grep -oE 'https://github.com/[^/]+/[^/]+/pull/[0-9]+')
  
  if [ -n "$pr_url" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] PR created: $pr_url" >&2
    echo "[Hook] Checking GitHub Actions status..." >&2
    repo=$(echo "$pr_url" | sed -E 's|https://github.com/([^/]+/[^/]+)/pull/[0-9]+|\1|')
    pr_num=$(echo "$pr_url" | sed -E 's|.*/pull/([0-9]+)|\1|')
    echo "[Hook] To review PR: gh pr review $pr_num --repo $repo" >&2
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Log PR URL and provide review command after PR creation

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-format with Prettier after editing JS/TS files
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  if command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    prettier --write "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format JS/TS files with Prettier after edits

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Run TypeScript check after editing TS files
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  dir=$(dirname "$file_path")
  project_root="$dir"
  while [ "$project_root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$project_root/package.json" ]; do
    project_root=$(dirname "$project_root")
  done
  
  if [ -f "$project_root/tsconfig.json" ]; then
    cd "$project_root" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | grep "$file_path" | head -10 >&2 || true
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

#!/bin/bash
# Warn about console.log in edited files
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  console_logs=$(grep -n "console\\.log" "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
  
  if [ -n "$console_logs" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: console.log found in $file_path" >&2
    echo "$console_logs" | head -5 >&2
    echo "[Hook] Remove console.log before committing" >&2
  fi
fi

echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log statements after edits

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-format Python files with ruff after edits
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  repo_root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file_path")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo '.')
  if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    ruff check --fix --quiet "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2
    ruff format --quiet "$file_path" 2>/dev/null
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff after edits

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Warn about print() statements in Python files
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  prints=$(grep -n '\bprint(' "$file_path" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '# noqa' || true)
  if [ -n "$prints" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: print() found in $file_path" >&2
    echo "$prints" | head -5 >&2
    echo "[Hook] Use logging module or remove before committing" >&2
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about print() statements in Python files after edits

hooks.command: bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/claude-md-tracker/track-changes.sh"

PostToolUse.description: Track structural changes for CLAUDE.md staleness detection

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  result=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/php -l "$file_path" 2>&1)
  if echo "$result" | grep -q 'Parse error\|Fatal error'; then
    echo "[Hook] PHP SYNTAX ERROR in $file_path" >&2
    echo "$result" | head -5 >&2
    exit 1
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: PHP syntax check on all PHP file edits/writes

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  if command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    prettier --write "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format JS/TS files with Prettier after writes

hooks.command: bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/image-optimizer/optimize-image.sh"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-optimize images: compress, generate WebP, resize oversized

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_output.stdout // .tool_output.output // ""')
if echo "$output" | grep -q 'Deploy complete'; then
  echo '[Auto] Deploy succeeded — run /verification-before-completion to verify live site.' >&2
  echo '[Auto] Quick check: curl -sI https://skyyrose.co | grep -E "HTTP|x-cache"' >&2
fi
echo "$input"

#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_output.stdout // .tool_output.output // ""')
if echo "$output" | grep -qE '\[main|\[feat|\[fix'; then
  echo '[Auto] Commit created. Run /wp-simplify to review code quality before pushing.' >&2
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-prompt code quality review after commits

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    ruff check --fix --quiet "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2
    ruff format --quiet "$file_path" 2>/dev/null
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff after writes

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
cat <<'REINJECT'
[CRITICAL CONTEXT - Re-injected after compaction]

## DevSkyy Build Rules (do NOT forget these):
- CDN caches CSS aggressively — bump SKYYROSE_VERSION or use ?nocache= to verify
- enqueue.php template slug map must match actual template filenames exactly
- Collection page CSS loads via $standalone_css_map — don't duplicate with inline enqueues
- When removing a PHP section, also remove its CSS rules AND responsive breakpoint overrides
- Showcase card content should be visible by default (opacity: 1), not hidden until hover
- Don't duplicate content sections — if showcase cards show collections, don't add separate narrative cards with same data
- Holo card grid: only .product-grid, .product-grid__items, .br-product-grid__items should be display: grid
- Fix everything in one batch, test all pages, deploy ONCE — no back-and-forth
- When cleaning up: update EVERY file that references deleted code
- Use npm not pnpm for Vercel deploys
- MUST verify all APIs with Context7 before writing any code
REINJECT

PostCompact.description: Re-inject critical DevSkyy build rules after context compaction

hooks.command: bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/claude-md-tracker/session-summary.sh"

Stop.description: Summarize CLAUDE.md staleness at session end

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-prompt: review changed code before session ends
changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
if [ "$changed" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo '[Auto] '$changed' file(s) changed this session. Run /code-review or /simplify before committing.' >&2
fi

Stop.description: Remind to review changed code before session ends
Remind to extract learnings at session end
